name: Portuguese Sweet Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the bread ingredients as usual for any yeast bread.
Cover and let rise for 2 hours.
2. Punch down the dough, then divide it in half.
Roll each half into a rope and coil each rope into snail shapes.
Cover and let rise again for 1 hour.
3. Brush the shaped dough with beaten egg and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 35-45 minutes.
